title: The Mystery of Cell
description: With the social progress and the continuous improvement of people's living standards, people pay more and more attention to the knowledge and topics of eugenics, health, quality of life, disease prevention and treatment, longevity, and other aspects and urgently need to understand some of our own life phenomena and essential content. Because all biological individuals including us are composed of cells, and the birth, growth and development, disease, aging, and death of life are the results of cell changes in the body, understanding the mystery of cells is the basis of understanding life. "The mystery of cell" course will guide us on learning more about the scientific principles of the essence of life, and improve our awareness of life and health.

instructors.name: Xianlu ZENG;张瑜Zhang Yu;何潇潇He Xiaoxiao;陆军Lu Jun;黄百渠Huang Baiqu;鲍永利Bao Yongli;李晓萌Li Xiaomeng;朱筱娟Zhu Xiaojuan;可月双;巴雪青Ba Xueqing
